strengths: Strong fullstack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
Track record with clean architecture, TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Experience integrating diverse data sources and building scalable cloud-deployed systems (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Seniority level (Staff/Senior) significantly exceeds the entry-level scope of the role
Limited PostgreSQL evidence — database experience leans toward MongoDB and MySQL
Only basic German, while the role requires high on-site presence in a German consulting/construction context
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, React, and Node.js along with cloud, Kubernetes, and clean-architecture experience that clearly exceeds the technical bar of the role. However, the position is explicitly entry-level, and the candidate's senior/staff trajectory raises questions about fit, growth expectations, and compensation alignment. Database experience favors MongoDB over PostgreSQL, and limited German may complicate the on-site consulting context, though the technical foundation is strongly aligned.
